title: STAR Incident - Enigma RAG Latency Regression
content:
Incident: End-to-end latency pressure in retrieval and generation pipeline

Situation:
- RAG workflows faced latency pressure that reduced responsiveness for operational users.
- Pipeline stages were sequentially expensive under increasing document volume.

Task:
- Bring response times back to practical production levels without lowering output quality.

Action:
- Profiled stage-level bottlenecks across retrieval, generation, and post-processing steps.
- Applied async or parallel execution where independent operations were possible.
- Reduced repeated work through caching and more efficient request handling.
- Rebalanced tradeoffs between retrieval depth, model selection, and execution cost.

Result:
- Source context reports substantial latency improvement and smoother user-facing performance.
- Incident drove a reusable performance-tuning playbook for future pipeline updates.
